title: Stylized Above/Below Ocean
description: A stylized ocean with FFT displacement, choppy wave normals, height-colored water, stylized sun specular paths, foam from Jacobian history, a tinted seafloor with soft caustics, and an underwater Beer-Lambert composite.
backend: WebGL2 fragment FFT plus GLSL surface, seafloor, and underwater composite
techniques: three FFT displacement and derivative bands
height-driven deep and shallow water color
stylized sun path specular and subsurface scatter
